servinfo.title: Dragging brakes (A very light drag is present in all brakes immediately after pedal is released)

condition.ptxt: Dragging brakes (A very light drag is present in all brakes immediately after pedal is released)

ps.ptxt: Master cylinder pistons not returning correctly

action.ptxt: Check for soft hoses or damaged pipes and replace with new hoses and/or new brake piping.

ps.ptxt: Incorrect parking brake adjustment on rear brakes

action.ptxt: Check and adjust to correct specifications.

ps.ptxt: Sluggish parking brake cables or linkage
Badly worn piston seal in caliper
